mapper.sql: id, order_id, order_item_id, user_id, product_id, score, content, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select oi.order_id, oi.id as order_item_id, oi.product_id from ws_order_item oi inner join ws_order o on oi.order_id = o.id where oi.id = #{orderItemId} and o.user_id = #{userId} and o.status = 3 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into ws_comment(order_id, order_item_id, user_id, product_id, score, content, status) values (#{orderId}, #{orderItemId}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{score}, #{content}, #{status})
mapper.select: select from ws_comment where product_id = #{productId} and status = 1 order by created_at desc
select from ws_comment where user_id = #{userId} order by created_at desc
select from ws_comment order by created_at desc
